com.pax.poslink.constant

Class CardEvent

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.pax.poslink.constant.CardEvent

  • public class CardEvent
extends java.lang.Object
    The event of card. Used when need card information.

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field and Description
      static java.lang.String CLSS_LIGHT_STATUS_COMPLETE
      The light of contactless should change to complete status.
      static java.lang.String CLSS_LIGHT_STATUS_ERROR
      The light of contactless should change to error status.
      static java.lang.String CLSS_LIGHT_STATUS_IDLE
      The light of contactless should change to idle status.
      static java.lang.String CLSS_LIGHT_STATUS_NOT_READY
      The light of contactless should change to not ready status.
      static java.lang.String CLSS_LIGHT_STATUS_PROCESSING
      The light of contactless should change to processing status.
      static java.lang.String CLSS_LIGHT_STATUS_READY_FOR_TXN
      The light of contactless should change to transaction ready status.
      static java.lang.String CLSS_LIGHT_STATUS_REMOVE_CARD
      The light of contactless should inform card need removed.
      static java.lang.String FALLBACK_INSERT
      It will be fired when "CLSS_READ_ERROR" occurred
      static java.lang.String FALLBACK_MANUAL
      Only take effect when manual input mode is supported.
      static java.lang.String FALLBACK_SWIPE
      Only take effect when swipe mode is supported.
      static java.lang.String FALLBACK_SWIPE_CHIP_NOT_ACCEPTED
      Only take effect when swipe mode is supported.
      static java.lang.String RETRY_INSERT
      Only take effect when insert mode is supported.
      static java.lang.String SECURITY_INPUT_FORMAT_ERROR
      It will be fired when "STATE_INPUT_FORMAT_ERROR" occurred Only take effect when the server presses confirm
      static java.lang.String SECURITY_INPUT_LUHN_CHECK_ERROR
      It will be fired when "STATE_INPUT_LUHN_CHECK_ERROR" occurred Only take effect when InputAccount.handleInputCardNum(String, InputAccount.InputCardNumCallback) is called
      static java.lang.String SECURITY_INPUT_LUHN_CHECK_OK
      It will be fired when "STATE_INPUT_LUHN_CHECK_OK" occurred Only take effect when InputAccount.handleInputCardNum(String, InputAccount.InputCardNumCallback) is called

        The light of contactless should change to not ready status.

        public static final java.lang.String CLSS_LIGHT_STATUS_IDLE
        The light of contactless should change to idle status.

        public static final java.lang.String CLSS_LIGHT_STATUS_READY_FOR_TXN
        The light of contactless should change to transaction ready status.
        See Also:
        Constant Field Values

      • CLSS_LIGHT_STATUS_PROCESSING

        public static final java.lang.String CLSS_LIGHT_STATUS_PROCESSING
        The light of contactless should change to processing status.
        See Also:
        Constant Field Values

      • CLSS_LIGHT_STATUS_REMOVE_CARD

        public static final java.lang.String CLSS_LIGHT_STATUS_REMOVE_CARD
        The light of contactless should inform card need removed.
        See Also:
        Constant Field Values

      • CLSS_LIGHT_STATUS_COMPLETE

        public static final java.lang.String CLSS_LIGHT_STATUS_COMPLETE
        The light of contactless should change to complete status.
        See Also:
        Constant Field Values

      • CLSS_LIGHT_STATUS_ERROR

        public static final java.lang.String CLSS_LIGHT_STATUS_ERROR
        The light of contactless should change to error status.
        See Also:
        Constant Field Values

      • FALLBACK_SWIPE

        public static final java.lang.String FALLBACK_SWIPE
        Only take effect when swipe mode is supported. When this event occurs, you must be in the input account page.
        Returned in the event of a technical fallback.(i.e ATR not received from chip and contact retries exceeded).
        See Also:
        Constant Field Values

      • FALLBACK_SWIPE_CHIP_NOT_ACCEPTED

        public static final java.lang.String FALLBACK_SWIPE_CHIP_NOT_ACCEPTED
        Only take effect when swipe mode is supported. When this event occurs, you must be in the input account page.
        Returned in the event of a EMV fallback (i.e. empty candidate list).
        See Also:
        Constant Field Values

      • RETRY_INSERT

        public static final java.lang.String RETRY_INSERT
        Only take effect when insert mode is supported. When this event occurs, you must be in the input account page. It will be fired for swipe/insert error occurred
        See Also:
        Constant Field Values

      • FALLBACK_INSERT

        public static final java.lang.String FALLBACK_INSERT
        It will be fired when "CLSS_READ_ERROR" occurred
        Since:
        V1.09.01
        See Also:
        Constant Field Values

      • SECURITY_INPUT_FORMAT_ERROR

        public static final java.lang.String SECURITY_INPUT_FORMAT_ERROR
        It will be fired when "STATE_INPUT_FORMAT_ERROR" occurred Only take effect when the server presses confirm
        Since:
        V1.09.02
        See Also:
        Constant Field Values

      • SECURITY_INPUT_LUHN_CHECK_OK

        public static final java.lang.String SECURITY_INPUT_LUHN_CHECK_OK
        It will be fired when "STATE_INPUT_LUHN_CHECK_OK" occurred Only take effect when InputAccount.handleInputCardNum(String, InputAccount.InputCardNumCallback) is called
        Since:
        V1.09.02
        See Also:
        Constant Field Values

      • SECURITY_INPUT_LUHN_CHECK_ERROR

        public static final java.lang.String SECURITY_INPUT_LUHN_CHECK_ERROR
        It will be fired when "STATE_INPUT_LUHN_CHECK_ERROR" occurred Only take effect when InputAccount.handleInputCardNum(String, InputAccount.InputCardNumCallback) is called
        Since:
        V1.09.02
        See Also:
        Constant Field Values

      • FALLBACK_MANUAL

        public static final java.lang.String FALLBACK_MANUAL
        Only take effect when manual input mode is supported. When this event occurs, you must be in the input account page.
        Returned in the event of a technical fallback. (i.e bad swipe).
        Since:
        V1.12.00
        See Also:
        Constant Field Values

      • CardEvent

        public CardEvent()
